title: Odonia multiflora
taxonomy: Odonia multiflora is a species of flowering plant in the family Balsamaceae. It is native to North America. Odonia multiflora is commonly known as the multiflora or the false balsam. This plant is a shrub that produces clusters of small white flowers. Odonia multiflora is a member of the order Sapindales.
